eye.decision: Use separate eye open/smile/eyeball/brow parameters; verify neutral and extreme eye screenshots.

mouth.decision: Use MouthOpen/Form plus vowel/lip-sync references when available; Kei is the mouth baseline.

hair.decision: Use front/side/back hair parameters and physics outputs; Miku/Hiyori are primary hair baselines.

body_angle.decision: Use AngleX/Y/Z and BodyAngleX/Y/Z as standard motion axes; avoid treating extreme sweep as natural pose.

arm.decision: Keep optional for v2_min, but include arm/hand/shoulder variants in v2_standard when the design needs gestures.

physics.decision: Require physics groups for hair/body secondary motion; use output category coverage as the main quality signal.

mask_pose_expression.decision: Use mask/pose/expression only when design needs it; do not force rich-sample complexity into v2_min.

psd_layering.decision: Use PSD/material split examples as taxonomy guidance only; do not reuse official art assets.
